input_contract: Drive root, model checkpoints, dataset zips

completion_gate: OOF final_ema freeze manifest reports manuscript_ready=true, checkpoint_kind=final_ema, and complete fixed-epoch provenance; external_protocol_gate_summary.csv reports PTB-XL/Georgia/CPSC2021 passed; Georgia mapping review must not coerce unmapped labels; CPSC windows must be majority AF/AFL or majority recognized normal; few-shot requires passed external gate and split manifest
status_notes: Canonical Chapman OOF complete. PTB-XL, Georgia, and CPSC2021 protocol-gated external evidence and score-calibration packages are complete with restrictions.
